# Puzzle Games

> Free daily logic and word puzzles with interactive play, solutions, level tracks, and archives.

- Website: https://puzzlegames.fun
- GitHub: https://github.com/vichitr/puzzle-games
- Archive: https://puzzlegames.fun/archive
- LinkedIn dailies: https://puzzlegames.fun/linkedin-puzzles

## Games

- Queens — https://puzzlegames.fun/queens
- Tango — https://puzzlegames.fun/tango
- Zip — https://puzzlegames.fun/zip
- Mini Sudoku — https://puzzlegames.fun/mini-sudoku
- Patches — https://puzzlegames.fun/patches
- Crossclimb — https://puzzlegames.fun/crossclimb
- Pinpoint — https://puzzlegames.fun/pinpoint

## Documentation in this repo

- Architecture: https://github.com/vichitr/puzzle-games/blob/main/docs/architecture.md
- Puzzle JSON format: https://github.com/vichitr/puzzle-games/blob/main/docs/puzzle-data-format.md
- Example puzzles: https://github.com/vichitr/puzzle-games/tree/main/examples

## About

Puzzle Games is a static Next.js site. Puzzles are stored as JSON files and rendered with interactive boards and step-by-step solution reveals. The site includes exclusive level tracks, random practice mode, and a LinkedIn daily puzzle archive.
